_description: Fixture autopickup.json for the daily-digest tick-step self-test (#266). last_digest_run is null so the daily digest-due gate fires on a never-run repo; digest_time is the default 09:00 so the smoke harness can place 'now' before/after it via --hour/--minute to prove the time-of-day gate. The harness also derives same-day and yesterday variants via jq to prove once/day-then-false idempotency. See docs/specs/2026-06-08-digest-tick-step.md.
